# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Shadow Warden AI takes security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability,
please **do not** open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, report it privately:

- **Email**: security@shadowwarden.ai
- **Web**: https://shadowwarden.ai/contact
- **Response time**: We aim to acknowledge reports within 24 hours and provide
  an initial assessment within 72 hours.

Please include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested mitigations

We will coordinate disclosure with you and credit researchers who report valid issues.

## Proprietary Software Notice

This repository contains proprietary software. Access to this repository is
governed by a separate license agreement or NDA. Unauthorized access, copying,
or distribution is strictly prohibited. See [LICENSE](../LICENSE) for details.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 2.3.x   | ✅ Active  |
| 2.2.x   | ✅ Active  |
| < 2.2   | ❌ EOL     |
